## AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work

Visit website

Hiring software

Badge gives an AI agent that collects peer reviews to build proof of work. For job seekers - The agent connects to your contacts, requests anonymous reviews from your past colleagues, and builds a verified, portable trust score. score. For hiring managers - Badge gives you a 30 second reference checks on candidates, collecting authentic feedback from their actual coworkers to replace unreliable, AI-generated resumes and LinkedIn Recommendations.

@galdayan No,  Rather than only allowing candidates to hand-pick who reviews them, Badge's AI agent works independently. It pulls data from your contacts  to identify people you've actually worked with and reaches out to them for a review.This means the candidate has no control over who gets asked

@galdayan Gal, No - So this is how it works.

1. You give access of your contact book to agent.
2. It finds the colleagues from your contactbook
3. It reaches out to all of them.

On ios though you can select few, but anyone can still review you using LinkedIn and Phonenumber. [...] Report

Review Audo?

Audo is praised for its intuitive AI-powered features that assist users in career navigation, resume optimization, and interview preparation. Users appreciate its personalized approach, which tailors career paths and resources to individual strengths and market demands. The platform is noted for its user-friendly design, making it accessible for both beginners and experienced professionals. While some users report technical issues, the overall feedback highlights Audo as a valuable tool for career advancement, offering a comprehensive suite of services that enhance professional growth and job market success.

I have been blown away by how easy the Audo platform is to use. Using Audo via a mobile browser, in a short amount of time I was able to tailor my resume for multiple job roles, each customized by company, industry, and job title. My main resume I imported to LinkedIn for a greatly improved profile. Each resume helped me highlight my skills and experiences in a way that truly stood out. Audo is a game-changer for anyone looking to land their next big leap of a role.

results.title: Hyring Reviews (2026)
results.content:
This is exactly the kind of innovation the hiring world needs right now. Traditional recruitment often drains huge amounts of time and resources—screening resumes manually, scheduling calls, and dealing with unconscious bias in the process. An AI-first approach that uses agents like video interviewers and phone screeners can completely transform this experience for both candidates and employers. By automating repetitive tasks, recruiters can finally focus on building real human connections instead of being buried in admin work. At the same time, candidates benefit from faster responses, fairer evaluations, and a smoother journey overall. A system that’s 100x smarter, faster, and bias-free isn’t just about efficiency—it’s about creating a hiring process that’s more human-centric, [...] #### What's great

time-saving (4)bias-free hiring (1)innovative hiring techniques (3)automation of interviews (1)
